bu-⸢kur₂⸣ dNU.DIM₂.MUD dAMAR.UTU [...]

flake 10'10'

(flake 10') Lord of the Esaggil, trust of Babylon, [...],

flake 11'11'

mu-šal-⸢lim⸣ ZItu₂ a-ša₂-red E₂.MAḪ.TI.⸢LA⸣ [...]

(flake 11') Safeguarder of life, first and foremost of the Emahtila, [...]

flake 12'12'

ṣu-lul ⸢ma-a⸣-tu ga-mil ni-ši rap-ša₂-a-tu₂ ⸢UŠUMGAL⸣ [...]

(flake 12') Protection of the land, saviour of the extensive people, great dragon [...]

flake 13'13'

MU-ka ⸢ka⸣-liš ina ⸢pi-i ni⸣-ši ⸢ṭa⸣-[a-bi]

(flake 13') Your name is good in the mouth of people everywhere.

flake 14'14'

dAMAR.UTU EN ⸢GAL⸣u₂ DINGIR reme-nu-u₂ ina KA⸢bi-ti-ka kit⸣-[ti ...]

(flake 14') O Marduk, great lord, merciful god, let me [...] (and) be healthy at your true command that I may praise your divinity! May I obtain [whatever] I wish for. Put truth in my mouth! Let there be [...] of kindness in my heart! May the tīru-courtier and the attendant decree prosperity (for me). May my god stand [...], may my goddess stand [...].

lu-uš-lim-ma lu-⸢uš⸣-ta-mar DINGIRut-ka ⸢e⸣-ma u₂-ṣa-am-[ma-ru]

SIG₅ti₃ ina lib₃-bi-ia ti-⸢i?-ru⸣ u ⸢na⸣-[an-za-zu]

liq-bu-u₂ SIG₅ti₃ DINGIR-ia₅ ⸢li⸣-[iz-ziz ...]
